title: Nantes, Pays de la Loire — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nantes, Pays de la Loire: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nantes is a city in Pays de la Loire with a population of 314,000. A dynamic city on the Loire River with a creative arts scene, medieval castle, and excellent quality of life.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
